appointments.notes: I signed up on 12/27/25 and I kept looking for an email providing access to the Social Media Challenge 2026 program, but I never received an email that really indicated how I access the membership area.  I finally went back through all of the emails and I saw at the bottom the GoGetUmCommunity.com domain, so I clicked on that and then I found a Login Button at the top, and I was finally able to login there today.  I'm mentioning this because there might be others also having an issue trying to find out how to access the community.  I checked back on every email I received, and couldn't fine anything except in 1 email it mentioned accessing the app, which probably would have taken me to the sign up area, but I thought there would be an email detailing access and I prefer to work on my computer.  OK, I just wanted to share that with you.  Looking forward to learning more during the upcoming call.
appointments.description: I signed up on 12/27/25 and I kept looking for an email providing access to the Social Media Challenge 2026 program, but I never received an email that really indicated how I access the membership area.  I finally went back through all of the emails and I saw at the bottom the GoGetUmCommunity.com domain, so I clicked on that and then I found a Login Button at the top, and I was finally able to login there today.  I'm mentioning this because there might be others also having an issue trying to find out how to access the community.  I checked back on every email I received, and couldn't fine anything except in 1 email it mentioned accessing the app, which probably would have taken me to the sign up area, but I thought there would be an email detailing access and I prefer to work on my computer.  OK, I just wanted to share that with you.  Looking forward to learning more during the upcoming call.
